tasks.objective: Validate Ubuntu chat backend health and API response evidence for website integration
tasks.summary: Health and chat endpoint validations passed with no out-of-scope edits.

tasks.objective: Validate ngrok-backed Lariel chat endpoint end-to-end from external Windows client
tasks.summary: All three checks passed: /health HTTP 200, backend healthy 49 docs qwen2.5:14b, /api/chat returning accurate answers.

tasks.objective: Initialize Git-based sync transport between Windows Main and Ubuntu Worker
tasks.summary: Repo pushed to GitHub. Ubuntu Worker cloned successfully. Git sync loop confirmed operational.

tasks.objective: First real two-machine Git loop. Pull this task from GitHub on Ubuntu, perform a RAG knowledge base status snapshot, push result back to GitHub for Main review.
tasks.summary: Result was placeholder-only and failed required evidence checks; retried as TASK-0004A.

tasks.objective: Retry TASK-0004 with full evidence. Produce a complete RAG knowledge base status snapshot from Ubuntu and push results through Git.
tasks.summary: Approved with exception: evidence complete except direct Chroma query mismatch; follow-up issued as TASK-0005.

tasks.objective: Diagnose and resolve Chroma collection path mismatch between Flask /health output and direct shell access.
tasks.summary: Passed. Canonical backend Chroma path identified as site_kb_chromadb with lariel_site_kb count 49; mismatch explained by separate services and data dirs.

tasks.objective: Operationalize the Chroma path fix by adding a repeatable verification script that proves /health and direct Chroma counts stay aligned for lariel_site_kb.
tasks.summary: Passed. Verifier script confirms /health.documents equals direct lariel_site_kb count (49) with correct success/failure exit behavior.
